candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; appears twice but this is the standard revenue line. Prefer this over the generic balancing item.
Balancing construct, not the primary operational revenue line; only chosen if no proper revenue line existed, which is not the case here.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility
candidates.why: Only candidate provided; clearly describes materials and inventory-related expenses that function as cost of goods/services.

final_choice.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility

candidates.why: Broad operating cost bucket that likely mixes direct and indirect costs; given availability of explicit SG&A-related rows, this should not be selected to avoid contaminating SG&A with COGS-like items.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly a component of SG&A (labor-related SG&A). Fits definition of SG&A overhead and is a detailed component row.
Classic SG&A component (administrative overhead). Appropriate as SG&A component per rules.
Explicit SG&A line. Even if preview values are empty, rule states we should prefer explicit SG&A and include it for coverage.
Balance sheet liability, not a P&L expense line; should not be treated as SG&A expense.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Following rule (b): an explicit SG&A line exists, so we include it. We also include clearly labeled SG&A components (Labor & Related..., Administrative Expenses). We exclude the broad 'Operating expenses' bucket to avoid including COGS-like items.
No R&D-related row provided in candidates; treat as missing (interpreted as 0 in PROF).

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Includes interest plus other financial expenses; less pure than a dedicated interest expense line that is also available.
Dedicated interest expense line; best representation of interest cost as required by XINT.
Derivative-related; not pure interest expense; should not be primary XINT choice when a direct interest expense line exists.
Unrealized derivative fair value changes; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Loss on previously held equity interest
candidates.why: One-off loss on equity interest, not interest expense.
Represents profit attributable to minority shareholders, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; a subset of total interest but narrower than the general interest expense line.
Equity item for minority shareholders, not an expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Written put option over non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Liability related to NCI; not interest expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders, not interest.

variables.notes: Chose the pure 'Interest expenses' line as the best representation of interest cost, rather than broader or derivative-related items.

candidates.row_label: Loss on previously held equity interest
candidates.why: Income statement item, not an equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Changes in the fair value of equity investments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI flow, not total equity balance.
Equity income measure; not total equity balance.
Label present but appears unused/empty; conceptually part of equity but less complete than provided total equity lines.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Clear common shareholders’ equity line; best match for book equity for PROF purposes.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; broader than common equity but still a reasonable alternative.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Selected common shareholders’ equity rather than total equity including NCI, matching typical PROF book equity definition.

candidates.why: Minority interest share of profit for the period (flow), not the balance sheet amount.
Balance sheet NCI line; represents minority shareholders’ equity stake—appropriate for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Written put option over non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Liability related to NCI but not the NCI equity itself.
Explicit minority interest equity line, appears to duplicate NCI; also a valid representation of MIB.
Income statement allocation of profit to minorities (flow), not the stock of minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income prior to allocation to minorities; not the minority interest itself.

variables.notes: Chose the balance sheet 'Minority Interest' line as the MIB stock measure; it directly represents minority equity.
